name: wechat-obsidian-bridge
description: 微信 ↔ Obsidian 随身第二大脑桥：基于微信官方 iLink Bot 协议 + 本机 Claude Code，不依赖 OpenClaw。WeChat as a mobile gateway to your local Obsidian vault, powered by the official WeChat iLink bot protocol and Claude Code.

scripts.logout: node -e "require('fs').rmSync('./data/bot_token.json',{force:true});console.log('token 已删除，下次启动重新扫码')"
